## Description

Brief description of the changes in this pull request.

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI/CD change
- [ ] Security hardening

## Affected Service(s)

List the microservices or components modified by this PR.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] Integration test coverage (if applicable)

## Compliance & Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII committed
- [ ] Input validation applied to new endpoints or parameters
- [ ] Authentication and authorization checks in place for new endpoints
- [ ] Dockerfiles maintain non-root user (UID 1001) if modified
- [ ] Dependencies added via Central Package Management (`Directory.Packages.props`)
- [ ] New dependencies reviewed for known vulnerabilities
- [ ] Commits are signed (GPG or SSH)

## Documentation

- [ ] README or relevant docs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API changes documented
- [ ] No documentation changes required

## Review Notes

Add any context for reviewers, including architectural decisions, trade-offs, or
areas requiring close review.
